title: CKD Definition and Staging (eGFR + Albuminuria)
buzzwords: Filtration rate combined with protein leak
Diabetes and hypertension drive the disease
G1 through G5, A1 through A3

title: Anemia of CKD
buzzwords: Fatigue and pallor in advanced kidney disease
Iron deficiency common in early stages
Hypertension and VTE are therapy complications

title: CKD-Mineral and Bone Disorder (Renal Osteodystrophy)
buzzwords: Bone pain and fractures in dialysis patients
Treated with vitamin D and phosphate binders
Renal osteodystrophy from sustained PTH excess

title: Hyperkalemia and Metabolic Acidosis of CKD
buzzwords: Peaked T waves on routine ECG
Worsened by ACE inhibitors and ARBs
MRAs and diabetes raise the risk
Low bicarbonate with normal anion gap early
Acid retention as nephron mass falls
Resistant elevation is a dialysis indication
High anion gap acidosis in advanced CKD

title: Uremia / Uremic Syndrome
buzzwords: Nausea and vomiting in advanced disease
Pericarditis and pleuritis as classic triggers

title: Cardiovascular Complications of CKD
buzzwords: Leading cause of death in this population
Heart failure common at advanced stages
Statins reduce mortality in this group
Considered a coronary artery disease equivalent
Cardiovascular death exceeds progression to ESKD
